hero.title: I automate AEC workflows —
hero.subtitle: Custom Revit plugins, Dynamo scripts, and web tools that eliminate repetitive work for architects, BIM managers and engineering teams.

services.title: What I do
services.subtitle: Engineering-grade automation for the built environment.

automation.title: AEC process automation
automation.desc: Replace manual, repetitive work with reliable scripts and pipelines tailored to your studio.

plugins.title: Revit & Autodesk plugins
plugins.desc: Native C# / .NET add-ins that extend Revit, Navisworks and AutoCAD with the features your team actually needs.

dynamo.title: Dynamo scripting
dynamo.desc: Visual graphs and Python nodes that automate modeling, QA and data extraction tasks.

web.title: Web apps & 3D viewers
web.desc: Configurators, digital twins and APS-powered viewers that bring BIM data to the browser.

useCases.title: Outcomes, not features
useCases.subtitle: What teams actually get when we work together.

docs.title: Automated documentation
docs.desc: Sheets, schedules and exports generated in minutes — not days.

errors.title: Fewer BIM errors
errors.desc: Model audits and validation catch issues before they reach the contractor.

workflow.title: Streamlined workflows
workflow.desc: From concept to handover, your team focuses on design — not file plumbing.

tools.title: Custom internal tools
tools.desc: Bespoke utilities built around how your studio actually works.

demo.title: See it in action
demo.subtitle: A short walkthrough of a recent automation project.

tools.title: Built for the Autodesk ecosystem
tools.subtitle: Deep integration with the tools your team already uses.

about.title: About
about.p1: I'm a developer focused on the AEC industry — bridging the gap between architecture, engineering and software. For years I've worked alongside BIM managers, designers and contractors, building tools that remove friction from their daily work.
about.p2: My focus is simple: ship pragmatic automation that pays for itself within weeks, not quarters.

contact.title: Let's build something
contact.subtitle: Tell me about your project — I usually reply within a day.
